title: Expensive Hotel
body: One more job for the group [socialtec](http://www.xarop.com/tag/socialtec/ "Socialtec"). The website for a new Hotel in the historic center of the city of Valencia where the image takes center stage, occupying the background of the entire page. Realization of both the user interface design and the web prototype. [http://www.carohotel.com](http://www.carohotel.com/ "carohotel.com")
